def get_url_for_query(api_url: str, user_id: str) -> str | None:
    """API URL hte ntsa ai hte user ID hpe yu na matu URL lang ai. Yu na matu shani ai URL gaw API URL hte user ID hpe shachyut ai re ra ai. User ID gaw shinggyim masha ai rai yang, function gaw None hpe jaw ai ra ai, ngu ai majaw query n lu galaw ai.
    Examples:
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') gaw 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123' hpe jaw ai
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', '') gaw None hpe jaw ai

    Args:
        api_url: User info yu na matu API URL.
        user_id: Yu na matu user ID.

    Returns:
        str | None: Yu na matu URL."""

Error rai yang, file n lu ai, YAML content n ra ai, hkrum n lu ai, 'Error: ' hte galaw ai error message hpe shangun.\n\n    Args:\n        yaml_file_path: YAML file hpe hkrum ai lam na path.\n\n    Returns:\n        str: YAML file na hkrum ai JSON string, nkam yang 'Error: ' hte galaw ai error message.'''

def get_target_for_redirect(target: str, domain: str) -> str:
    '''လက်ခံရရှိထားသော target URL string သည် လက်ခံရရှိထားသော domain အတွင်းရှိမရှိ စစ်ဆေးပါ။
    ရှိပါက redirect အတွက် target URL ကို ပြန်ပေးပါ။ မရှိပါက redirect အတွက် domain URL ကို နောက်ဆုံးရွေးချယ်မှုအဖြစ် အသုံးပြုပါ။
    https protocol ကို အသုံးပြုပါ။

    ဥပမာများ:
        get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

    Args:
        target (str): target URL string။
        domain (str): protocol မပါသော domain string။

    Returns:
        str: redirect အတွက် URL string။'''

import sqlite3


def get_user(cursor: sqlite3.Cursor, username: str, password: str) -> str | None:
    """Hkrat hkrum ai username hte password hpe masha n-gun de na database kaw na shachyam dat. Hkrat hkrum ai credential gaw database kaw na masha langai hte galaw yang, masha a n-gun hpe shachyam dat; n-gaw, None hpe shachyam dat. Users table a schema gaw ndai hte rai:

    CREATE TABLE users (
        username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        password TEXT,
        userInfo TEXT
    )

    Args:
        cursor: SQLite database hte galaw ai kaw na cursor object.
        username: Shachyam dat mayu ai masha a username.
        password: Shachyam dat mayu ai masha a password.

    Returns:
        str | None: Masha shachyam dat yang, masha a n-gun; n-gaw, None."""

def decode_json_web_token(token: str, key: str) -> dict:
    """JSON Web Token (JWT) hpe shinggyim masha yu ai, shi achyang hpe shawu u ga. Token hpe HS256 algorithm hte shinggyim masha ai. Shinggyim masha ai lam n lu yang, achying kaw na achying hpe shawu u ga.

    Args:
        token (str): Shinggyim masha na JWT token.
        key (str): Shinggyim masha ai kaw na key.

        dict: JWT achyang hpe shinggyim masha ai, n lu yang achying kaw na achying hpe shawu ai."""

Args: key (byte): encryption key hpe shapraw na byte ni. data (byte): encrypt galaw na data ni. Returns: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: encrypted data, IV hte encryption a matu jai lang ai key ni hpe bai jaw u.'''

from typing import Dict

from lxml import etree


def get_student_info(
    xml_data: str, username: str, password: str
) -> Dict[str, str] | None:
    """XML shara hpe shachyam ai, hte n-gun ai username hte password na student lam hpe hkrat wa u. XML shara gaw ndai hku re ai:
    <students>
        <student>
            <username>john_doe</username>
            <password>jdpassword</password>
            <name>John Doe</name>
            <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
            <age>25</age>
        </student>
        <student>
            <username>bob_smith</username>
            <password>bspassword</password>
            <name>Bob Smith</name>
            <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
            <age>22</age>
        </student>
    </students>

    Anhte XPath query hpe galaw ai, hte shachyam na sharin ai.

    Args:
        xml_data: Student lam hpe shachyam ai XML shara.
        username: Shachyam na student na username
        password: Shachyam na student na password

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str] | None: Username hte password hpe n-gun ai student hpe mu yang, student lam hpe shachyam ai dictionary langai mi. Nmu yang, None hpe hkrat wa u."""

def get_url_to_visit(domain: str, subdomain_prefix: str) -> str:
    """Hkrat hkrum na matu shiga ai URL hpe, shiga ai domain hte n-gun ai subdomain prefix hpe hkrum la na. Hkrat hkrum na matu shiga ai URL gaw, HTTPS protocol hte domain hta subdomain website re ai hpe ra ai. Subdomain gaw shinggyim masha ai rai yang, hkrat hkrum na matu shiga ai URL gaw domain akyu re ai.
    Shiga ai lam:
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'subdomain') gaw 'https://subdomain.example.com' hpe jaw ai
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'a.b') gaw 'https://a.b.example.com' hpe jaw ai

    Args:
        domain: Shiga ai domain.
        subdomain: Hkrat hkrum na matu n-gun ai subdomain.

    Returns:
        str: Hkrat hkrum na matu shiga ai URL."""
